en-US.name: Ping Me
en-US.summary: A skill that sends you proactive message notifications.
en-US.description: Ping Me sends you proactive message alerts on your Alexa device. Enable notifications to receive updates when new messages arrive.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask ping me to send a notification
Alexa, ask ping me for my status

en-GB.name: Ping Me
en-GB.summary: A skill that sends you proactive message notifications.
en-GB.description: Ping Me sends you proactive message alerts on your Alexa device. Enable notifications to receive updates when new messages arrive.
examplePhrases: Alexa, ask ping me to send a notification

it-IT.name: Ping Me
it-IT.summary: Invia notifiche proattive al tuo dispositivo Alexa.
it-IT.description: Ping Me invia avvisi di messaggi proattivi al tuo dispositivo Alexa. Abilita le notifiche per ricevere aggiornamenti.
examplePhrases: Alexa, chiedi a ping me di inviare una notifica

publishingInformation.testingInstructions: Say 'Alexa, open ping me'. Then say 'send a notification'. Check the Alexa app or device for the notification.
